name: Basic Pizza Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 Clove Garlic, peeled, crushed and minced
Black pepper, freshly ground to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the contents of the tomato can into a 2-quart, heavy non-aluminum saucepan.
Coarsely crush the tomatoes with a fork.
2. Add the herbs, garlic, tomato paste, salt, and pepper.
3. Bring to a simmer over medium heat, stirring to mix the seasonings.
4. As soon as the sauce begins to bubble, reduce the heat to low.
5. Cook, uncovered, stirring occasionally for a minimum of 15 minutes and up to 1 hour.
